title: Rise of the Ottoman Empire
summary: From a small nomadic tribe on the edge of Anatolia, the Ottomans built one of history's greatest empires in just 150 years - through warfare, shrewd politics, and relentless ambition - culminating in the conquest of Constantinople.

context.headline: A tribe becomes an empire
context.description: In the late 1200s, a small Turkish tribe settled on the edge of the crumbling Byzantine Empire. Over 150 years they absorbed rivals, crossed into Europe, survived near-total collapse, and conquered Constantinople - ending the Byzantine Empire forever.
